name: flight_manual
description: Aircraft operating manual. Checklists, warnings, procedures. The essay as a pre-flight briefing for navigating perceptual space.
register: Imperative, numbered steps, WARNING/CAUTION/NOTE callouts. The reader is the pilot.
rules: Jack Jack is the co-pilot or navigation officer
The walk is a flight plan through perceptual airspace
All numbers preserved exactly -- they are the instrument data
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
Use WARNING for speculation zones, CAUTION for extrapolation, NOTE for observations
The coda is the landing checklist
Maintain the dry precision of technical writing throughout
